Interface Visitor<T extends Term>

All Known Subinterfaces:
DefaultVisitor
All Known Implementing Classes:
BoundVarsVisitor, ClashFreeSubst.VariableCollectVisitor, ConstraintAwareSyntacticalReplaceVisitor, LightweightSyntacticalReplaceVisitor, OpCollector, OpCollectorJavaBlock, ProgramMethodFinder, SolverListener.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor, SortCollector, SVNameCorrespondenceCollector, SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsIrrelevantThingsVisitor, SymbolicExecutionSideProofUtil.ContainsModalityOrQueryVisitor, SyntacticalReplaceVisitor, TacletSchemaVariableCollector, TacletVariableSVCollector, TacletVisitor, TermProgramVariableCollector, TermProgramVariableCollectorKeepUpdatesForBreakpointconditions, UninstantiatedGenericSortCollector
public interface Visitor<T extends Term>

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default void
    subtreeEntered(T subtreeRoot)
    this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when entering the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot.
    default void
    subtreeLeft(T subtreeRoot)
    this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when leaving the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot.
    void
    visit(T visited)
    the entry method for the visitor pattern
    default boolean
    visitSubtree(T visited)
    Checks if the subtree below the visited Term should be traversed.

  • Method Details

    • visitSubtree

      default boolean visitSubtree(T visited)

      Checks if the subtree below the visited Term should be traversed.

      By default, it always accepts any tree

      Parameters:
      visited - The currently visited Term.
      Returns:
      true visit subtree, false skip sub tree.

    • visit

      void visit(T visited)
      the entry method for the visitor pattern
      Parameters:
      visited - the Term to be visited

    • subtreeEntered

      default void subtreeEntered(T subtreeRoot)

      this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when entering the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot. Default implementation is to do nothing. Subclasses can override this method when the visitor behaviour depends on informations bound to subtrees.

      By default, it does nothing

      Parameters:
      subtreeRoot - root of the subtree which the visitor enters.

    • subtreeLeft

      default void subtreeLeft(T subtreeRoot)

      this method is called in execPreOrder and execPostOrder in class Term when leaving the subtree rooted in the term subtreeRoot. Default implementation is to do nothing. Subclasses can override this method when the visitor behaviour depends on informations bound to subtrees.

      By default, it does nothing

      Parameters:
      subtreeRoot - root of the subtree which the visitor leaves.
